zh.Ardee, County Louth, Ireland: 愛爾蘭庫迪 盧斯阿爾迪
zh.lifeSummary: 當John de Stanley於大約1360年出生在愛爾蘭時，他的父親William de Stanley32歲，母親Alice Massey31歲。他和Isabel de Latham至少有1個兒子和1個女兒。他於1415年登記服兵役。他於1414年被列為steward of macclesfield, cheshire。他去世於1413年1月28日之前在愛爾蘭庫迪 盧斯阿爾迪。

zh-hans.Ardee, County Louth, Ireland: 爱尔兰庫迪 盧斯阿爾迪
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当John de Stanley于大约1360年出生在爱尔兰时，他的父亲William de Stanley32岁，母亲Alice Massey31岁。他和Isabel de Latham至少有1个儿子和1个女儿。他于1415年登记服兵役。他于1414年被列为steward of macclesfield, cheshire。他去世于1413年1月28日之前在爱尔兰庫迪 盧斯阿爾迪。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Stanley
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from any of various places called Stanley, including those in Yorkshire, Staffordshire, Derbyshire, Durham, Gloucestershire, and Wiltshire, named with Old English stān ‘stone, rock’ + lēah ‘woodland clearing’. This English name has been established in Ireland since the 13th century where it was Gaelicized as de Stainléigh.

English: possibly also a variant of Stoneley, a habitational name from Stoneley Green in Burland (Cheshire), Stoneleigh (Warwickshire), or Stonely in Kimbolton (Huntingdonshire), all named with Old English stān ‘stone, rock’ + lēah ‘woodland clearing’.
Americanized form of any of various like-sounding names in other languages, for example Polish Stanislawski , Greek Anastasiou , and Serbian Stojadinov (patronymic from the personal name Stojadin).

variants.name: Stanislawski
meanings: Polish (Stanisławski): habitational name for someone from any of various places called Stanisław, Stanisławów, or Stanisławice, named with the personal name Stanisław (see Stanislav ).

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Contracted form of Old French Jo(h)anne, from Latin Io(h)anna ( see Joanna ). In England this was the usual feminine form of John from the Middle English period onwards and was extremely popular, but in the 16th and 17th centuries it steadily lost ground to Jane . It was strongly revived in the first part of the 20th century, partly under the influence of George Bernard Shaw's play St Joan ( 1923 ), based on the life of Joan of Arc ( 1412–31 ). Claiming to be guided by the voices of the saints, she persuaded the French dauphin to defy the occupying English forces and have himself crowned, and she led the French army that raised the siege of Orleans in 1429 . The following year she was captured by the Burgundians and sold to the English, and a year later she was burned at the stake for witchcraft at the age of 18 or 19. Her story has captured the imagination of many writers, and she is variously portrayed as a national and political hero, a model of apolitical straightforwardness and honesty, and a religious heroine. She was canonized in 1920 . More recent influences have included the American film actress Joan Crawford ( 1908–77 , born Lucille le Sueur ), the British actress Joan Collins ( b. 1933 ), the American comedienne Joan Rivers ( b. 1933 ), and the West Indian pop singer Joan Armatrading ( b. 1950 ).

en.lifeSummary: When John de Stanley was born about 1360, in Ireland, his father, William de Stanley, was 32 and his mother, Alice Massey, was 31. He had at least 1 son and 1 daughter with Isabel de Latham. He registered for military service in 1415. In 1414, his occupation is listed as steward of macclesfield, cheshire. He died before 28 January 1413, in Ardee, County Louth, Ireland.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque John de Stanley est né environ 1360, à Irlande, son père, William de Stanley, avait 32 ans et sa mère, Alice Massey, avait 31 ans. Il a eu au moins 1 fils et 1 fille avec Isabel de Latham. Il s'est inscrite au service militaire en 1415. En 1414, sa profession de son indiquée est steward of macclesfield, cheshire. Il est décédé avant 28 janvier 1413, à Ardee, County Louth, Irlande.

de.lifeSummary: Als John de Stanley um 1360 in Irland geboren wurde, war sein Vater William de Stanley 32 und seine Mutter Alice Massey 31. Er hatte mit Isabel de Latham mindestens 1 Sohn und 1 Tochter. Er hat sich 1415 zum Militärdienst angemeldet. 1414 ist sein Beruf als steward of macclesfield, cheshire aufgeführt. Er starb vor 28. Januar 1413 in Ardee, County Louth, Irland.

it.lifeSummary: Quando John de Stanley è nato il circa 1360 nel Irlanda, il suo padre, William de Stanley, aveva 32 anni e il suo madre, Alice Massey, aveva 31 anni. Lui avuto almeno 1 figlio e 1 figlia con Isabel de Latham. Si è arruolato nell'esercito nel 1415. Nel 1414, la sua occupazione è indicata come steward of macclesfield, cheshire. Morì prima del 28 gennaio 1413, nel Ardee, County Louth, Irlanda.

ja.lifeSummary: John de Stanleyが約1360年にアイルランドで生まれた時，父William de Stanleyは32歳，母Alice Masseyは31歳であった。彼はIsabel de Lathamとの間に少なくとも1人の息子と1人の娘をもうけた。彼は1415年に兵役登録をした。1414年，職業はsteward of macclesfield, cheshireと記録されている。彼は1413年1月28日以前にアイルランドコウントイ ロウスアルディーで死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: John de Stanley(이)가 대략 1360년 아일랜드에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 William de Stanley(은)는 32세였고, 그의 어머니 Alice Massey(은)는 31세였다. 그는 Isabel de Latham(와)과 적어도 한 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1415년에 군복무를 위해 등록했다. 1414년, 그의 직업은 steward of macclesfield, cheshire이었다. 그는 1413년 1월 28일 이전 아일랜드 카운티 루스 아디에서 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando John de Stanley nasceu aproximadamente 1360, em Irlanda, seu pai, William de Stanley, tinha 32 anos e sua mãe, Alice Massey, tinha 31 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 1 filho e 1 filha com Isabel de Latham. Ele alistou-se no serviço militar em 1415. Em 1414, sua profissão aparece como steward of macclesfield, cheshire. Ele faleceu antes 28 de janeiro de 1413, em Ardee, County Louth, Irlanda.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда John de Stanley родился около 1360 г. в местности Ирландия, его отцу по имени William de Stanley было 32 года, а матери, которую звали Alice Massey, 31. У него был по крайней мере 1 сын и 1 дочь от Isabel de Latham. В 1415 году он поступил на военную службу. В 1414 годуработал по профессии steward of macclesfield, cheshire. Он умер перед 28 январь 1413 г. в местности арди, коунти лоут, Ирландия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando John de Stanley nació aproximadamente 1360, en Irlanda, su papá, William de Stanley, tenía 32 años y su mamá, Alice Massey, tenía 31 años. Tuvo por lo menos 1 hijo y 1 hija con Isabel de Latham. Se enlistó en el ejército en 1415. En 1414, su ocupación registrada era steward of macclesfield, cheshire. Murió antes de 28 de enero de 1413, en Ardee, County Louth, Irlanda.
